headlines.title: 3 passengers evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship as new case is confirmed in Switzerland
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak faced a new challenge Wednesday as a local leader opposed allowing it to dock in Spain, while three passengers were medically evacuated to the Netherlands

headlines.title: Spain says it will harbor cruise ship at center of suspected hantavirus outbreak in its Canary Islands
headlines.description: The government of Spain said Tuesday that it will receive the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak at one of its ports in the Canary Islands

headlines.title: Rectal cancer deaths rising rapidly among millennials: 'It's a medical crisis'
headlines.description: Deaths from rectal cancer are rising rapidly among younger adults, an alarming trend that is confounding scientists trying to understand why millennials are so hard-hit.

headlines.title: What does it take to protect brain health? 10 habits to start now
headlines.description: Brain health is of paramount importance to nearly all Americans, yet few are aware of the latest science on how to nurture it

headlines.title: Pancreatic cancer mRNA vaccine shows lasting results in an early trial
headlines.description: Nearly all of the patients who responded to the a personalized mRNA pancreatic vaccine are still alive six years later.

headlines.title: Sick Passengers Evacuated From Hantavirus-Plagued Cruise
headlines.description: Three passengers suspected of being infected with Hantavirus have been evacuated from the cruise ship in the Atlantic and are on the way to get medical care. The World Health Organization has announced there are now eight cases of the virus stemming from the cluster onboard, where three have died. Now, the ship and its passengers are looking for a place to dock as global concerns grow about the spread. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: RFK Jr. launches plan to limit antidepressant prescriptions
headlines.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. announced a plan to limit the “overprescribing” of antidepressants and spoke for alternative treatment options when needed. NBC News' Tom Llamas spoke to New York Times reporter Ellen Barry about the latest health announcement.

headlines.title: Evacuation plan for cruise ship with deadly virus on board
headlines.description: The cruise ship where several passengers have died from the Hantavirus will head to the Canary Islands after a medical evacuation of the symptomatic people on board. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

headlines.title: Supreme Court Temporarily Restores Mail Access to Abortion Pill
headlines.description: The Supreme Court on Monday restored broad access to the abortion pill mifepristone, blocking a lower court ruling. The order temporarily allows women seeking abortions to obtain the pill at pharmacies or through the mail without an in-person visit to a doctor. It will remain in effect for another week while the high court considers the issue more fully.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.

headlines.title: Expert-approved walking pads that help you sit less and move more
headlines.description: Fitness trainers share the benefits of using walking pads daily for up to 60 mins. and safety tips. Plus, shop the best expert-approved walking pads.
